role: A small, animated inline status notice component that surfaces a dismissible message to the user.
capabilities: Animate enter and exit with a vertical fade slide
Expose an ARIA `status` role for accessibility
substance_why: The file implements a complete, self-contained notice UI with animation, dismissal, and accessibility attributes, despite its small size.
interactions_present: Click the × button to call onDismiss
interactions_missing: No focus management or focus trap
No support for actions or rich content inside the notice
performance_risks: Framer-motion animations may cause compositor work and re-renders on every enter/exit
No memoization, so parent re-renders will recreate the motion element subtree
reuse_why: The concept of a dismissible, accessible status notice is worth keeping, but its styling and animation library should be rebuilt to match the new design system.
decomposition_hints: Separate the presentational notice markup from the motion wrapper if the redesign introduces multiple notice variants or a shared animation primitive
Extract dismissal logic into a hook if auto-dismiss, keyboard dismissal, or focus management are added
